evals.prompt: I need to fetch Psalms 23:1 from Sefaria and display the English text in my TypeScript app. Show me the exact API call and how to normalize the response.
evals.expected_output: Agent provides the Sefaria endpoint: GET https://www.sefaria.org/api/texts/Psalms%2023:1?lang=en. Shows response normalization: strip HTML tags, flatten array to string, trim. Returns the expected verse text.
expectations: Response provides the correct Sefaria endpoint URL with URL-encoded reference
Response explains the text normalization steps (strip HTML, flatten array)
Response shows how to extract text from the json.text field
Response mentions the Sefaria attribution requirement (CC BY-SA 2.0)

evals.prompt: How do I fetch John 3:16 in the World English Bible (WEB) translation from bible-api.com? Show me the fetch call and explain which denominations the WEB translation is best suited for.
evals.expected_output: Agent provides: GET https://bible-api.com/john%203:16?translation=web. Notes WEB is public domain, includes deuterocanonicals, best for Catholic and Orthodox users. Shows json.text extraction with \n normalization.
expectations: Response provides the correct bible-api.com endpoint with translation=web parameter
Response identifies WEB as including deuterocanonicals
Response notes WEB is best for Catholic and Orthodox denominations
Response shows json.text extraction with whitespace normalization

evals.prompt: A user typed 'D&C 76:22' into my verse lookup. My app supports LDS denomination. Walk me through how the routing works -- does it go to bible-api.com or somewhere else?
evals.expected_output: Agent explains: D&C 76:22 is not a Bible reference, so isLdsBibleRef returns false. It routes to fetchNephiPassage() which calls scriptures.nephi.org/verses/D%26C%2076%3A22. If the API fails, throw LdsApiUnavailableError and surface the static fallback message pointing to churchofjesuschrist.org.
expectations: Response correctly identifies D&C 76:22 as a non-Bible LDS reference
Response explains isLdsBibleRef returns false for this reference
Response identifies scriptures.nephi.org as the routing target
Response mentions LdsApiUnavailableError and the static fallback message
